---
title: "Novelty"
subtitle: "Analysis of novelty"
author: "PENPAL Project"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    latex_engine: xelatex
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    code_folding: hide
    theme: united
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

# Load required packages
pacman::p_load(
  tidyverse,    # Data manipulation and plotting
  lme4,         # Mixed effects models
  lmerTest,     # P-values for mixed models
  arrow,        # Parquet file I/O
  stringi,      # String operations
  lubridate,    # Date/time handling
  zoo,          # Rolling statistics
  patchwork,    # Combine plots
  cowplot,      # Additional plot utilities
  afex,          # ANOVA
  here,          # File path management
  emmeans      # Estimated marginal means

)

# Set project root
PROJECT_ROOT <- here()
setwd(PROJECT_ROOT)

# Set global theme
theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 14))

# Define output directories
GRAPHS_DIR <- file.path(PROJECT_ROOT, "analysis", "figures")
TABLES_DIR <- file.path(PROJECT_ROOT, "analysis", "tables")

# Create output directories if they don't exist
dir.create(GRAPHS_DIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(TABLES_DIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
```



# 1. Data Loading and Preprocessing

## 1.1 Load Data

```{r load-data}

# Load Field Data
setwd(PROJECT_ROOT)
df_res_field <- read_csv("data/TEXT/processed/novelty_scores.csv") %>%
  filter(!is.na(user_surprise) & !is.na(ai_surprise)) %>%
  mutate(
    user_resonance = user_surprise - user_transience,
    ai_resonance = ai_surprise - ai_transience,
    datatype = "Field"
  ) %>%
  drop_na(user, ai) %>%
  filter(interaction_count > 1, interaction_count < 10)


```


```{r}
df_res_long <- df_res_field %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(user_surprise, user_transience, ai_surprise, ai_transience),
    names_to = c("agent", "metric"),
    names_pattern = "(user|ai)_(surprise|transience)"
  ) %>%
  
  pivot_wider(names_from = metric, values_from = value) %>%
  mutate(
    resonance = surprise - transience,
    agent = factor(agent, levels = c("user", "ai"), labels = c("User", "AI"))
  )



# Plot Resonance vs Novelty (Field Data)
ggplot(df_res_long, aes(x = surprise, y = resonance, color = agent)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, size = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("User" = "#1f77b4", "AI" = "#ff7f0e")) +
  labs(
    title = "Resonance vs Novelty (Field Data)",
    x = "Novelty (Surprisal)",
    y = "Resonance (Novelty - Transience)"
  ) +
  xlim(0,8) +
  ylim(-5,5) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

ggplot(df_res_long, aes(x = surprise, y = transience, color = agent)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, size = 1.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("User" = "#1f77b4", "AI" = "#ff7f0e")) +
  labs(
    title = "Transience vs Novelty (Field Data)",
    x = "Novelty (Surprisal)",
    y = "Transience)"
  ) +
  xlim(0,8) +
  ylim(0,5) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(legend.position = "top")
```



```{r}

ggplot() +
  # human points + extended line
  geom_point(data = df_res_field,
             aes(x = user_surprise, y = user_resonance, colour = "Human"),
             alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(data = df_res_field,
              aes(x = user_surprise, y = user_resonance, colour = "Human"),
              method = "lm",
              se     = FALSE,
              fullrange = TRUE) +
  
  # AI points + extended line
  geom_point(data = df_res_field,
             aes(x = ai_surprise, y = ai_resonance, colour = "AI"),
             alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(data = df_res_field,
              aes(x = ai_surprise, y = ai_resonance, colour = "AI"),
              method = "lm",
              se     = FALSE,
              fullrange = TRUE) +
  
  # manual colours & labels
  scale_colour_manual(name   = "Agent",
                      values = c(Human = "#1f77b4", AI = "#ff7f0e")) +
  labs(title = "Surprise vs. Resonance: Human vs. AI",
       x     = "Novelty",
       y     = "Resonance") +
  xlim(0,8) +
  ylim(-5,5) +
  theme_minimal()
```



```{r}

model_resonance <- lmer(resonance ~ surprise * agent + (1 | conversation_id), data = df_res_long)
summary(model_resonance)

# Compare slopes
emtrends(model_resonance, specs = "agent", var = "surprise")

```

```{r}

# fit linear model only on AI rows
fit_ai <- lm(resonance ~ surprise, data = df_res_long %>% filter(agent == "AI"))

df_res_long %>%
  group_by(agent) %>%
  summarise(
    min_surprise   = min(surprise,   na.rm = TRUE),
    max_surprise   = max(surprise,   na.rm = TRUE),
    min_resonance  = min(resonance,  na.rm = TRUE),
    max_resonance  = max(resonance,  na.rm = TRUE)
  )
ai_top <- df_res_long %>%
  filter(
    agent == "AI",
    surprise   > 2.5,   # adjust if needed
    resonance  > 2.0    # adjust if needed
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(resonance))

# Inspect in RStudio
#View(ai_top)

```
